tweet.text:
AI-native companies are getting more out of their AI tools.

Shocking? No.

A good sign of how AI readiness is compounding? Yes.

New data from @usepylon shows AI-native teams see more of their "AI-resolved" support tickets become real resolutions, not customers giving up and dropping off.

Companies that built around AI are now compounding the advantage.

h/t @marty_kausas
